content:
✨ note-gen | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a seamless and intelligent note-taking experience that leverages AI to help users capture, organize, and refine their thoughts and knowledge.
✨ Key Features: • AI-native writing workflow (chat, rewrite, translate, polish) • Image workflow (capture, recognize, describe, host, reuse) • Native Markdown storage (local-first, portable)
📖 Summary: NoteGen is a cross-platform, AI-native Markdown note-taking application designed for capturing ideas and transforming them into structured, readable notes. It offers a rich feature set including AI-powered writing assistance, image processing, local Markdown storage, and flexible synchronization options.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
